markdown:
#  Delete Owner Invoices 
#####  In Beta
This page details the modernized owner invoice experience.
##  Background 
You can delete an invoice only when it's in the _Draft_ , _Under Review_ , or _Revise and Resubmit_ status. You cannot delete an invoice when it's in the _Approved_ status.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * 'Admin' level permissions on the Prime Contracts tool.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * You can also delete invoices using the Invoicing tool. See Delete Owner Invoices.


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create Owner Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/create-owner-invoices)


##  Steps 
  1. Navigate to the project's **Invoicing** tool.
  2. Click the **Owner** tab.   
This is the active tab by default.
  3. Locate the invoice to delete. 
#####  Tip
**Did you know you can also navigate to owner invoices using the Prime Contracts tool?** To learn how, see [Delete Owner Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/delete-owner-invoices).
  4. Click the **Invoice #** link to open the invoice.
  5. In the invoice, click the ![Invoice Overflow Icon](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/40b17db9a4739a9a9c005f4fcc986d83/c694ed663529847683369810782ac565/invoice-overflow-icon.png?fm=webp&h=20) **Overflow** icon and choose the **Delete** option.


## See Also
  * [What are the default statuses for Procore invoices?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-are-the-default-statuses-for-procore-invoices)
  * [Invoicing - Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/permissions)
  * [Update and Set Up DocuSign® on an Owner Invoice](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/update-and-set-up-docusign-on-an-owner-invoice)
title: Delete Owner Invoices
description: How to delete an owner invoice from the Prime Contracts tool.
